feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sapui5 smarttable barcode
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to convert a smart table cell into a barcode image.

I am using the function JsBarcode inside a formatter but I am having an error because, I think, the table is not rendered yet.

In my view.xml I have:

 

                            <cells>
                                 <Image id="T" src="{path: 'Obj_key', formatter:'.formatBarcode'}" />
                            </cells>
 
Is there a way I can manipulate a smart table item cell after it has been rendered, as I think this might solve the issue?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements - Save Variant/Layout not working (and want to remove unnecessary column)
entry.content:
I have created an SAP Fiori Elements app. At first the list report would not even let me resize the columns (and they were very badly spaced out) but eventually I discovered that it would let me resize columns if I change the table to "Grid Table".

I am having two issues on the list report page:

1. When I resize the columns it allows me to save the layout but when I refresh, the layout I saved disappears.

2. There is an empty column on the left of the table that the user does not want as it takes up much needed space.

Any advice on these issues would be really appreciated.

The empty column on the left needs to be removed:

This is what I do to save the layout:

The new layout is saved:

But when I click on the drop down arrow:

And when I refresh, it is gone:

Additional information: I am working on an older SAP ECC system.

I implemented the annotations using a code-based backend implementation per this link

How to add annotations to an OData service using code based implementation 

And that looks like this:

Which means every time someone gives me a reference XML annotation I have to translate it into the code above. Then I have to clear all the caches on the GW server, re-load the metadata and then go into the app and refresh and save the metadata there too. Then run the app. This is time consuming and when it does work I don't know *why* it does not work. This makes it VERY difficult to move forward.

I am boxed into a corner - I can't save the layout of the table and I can't set the width of the columns which means that the app is not usable.

I tried doing one of the annotations on the frontend as per the suggestion below but it overwrote all my backend annotations not just the one I implemented (and it did not work). So that does not seem to be an option.

entry.title: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori app
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

Can you please help me in adding custom field in request material standard fiori app using custom field logic

entry.title: Calibration order
entry.content:
Dear All

Please let me know, how can we map calibration order in Public cloud, Because there is no any PM -QM integration found , without Quality inspection lots & MIC Now...

How can we done the Calibration Order ??????.

entry.title: How to call a Rest API in a Fiori App and show the result in a List
entry.content:
I want to develop a Fiori App which i can later add to the Fiori Launchpad. The App should call a REST API, and the result of the API should be displayed as a list in the Fiori App. 

I did create a few Fiori Apps with the SAP Tutorials, like this one https://developers.sap.com/group.sap-fiori-app-purchase-req.html 

All the tutorials i completed used eclipse to create Services, which i can access from SAP Business Application Studio. I understand that these Services in Eclipse are so called CDS Views, which only show Data from a Database. Can i also show Data from a API in these CDS Views or do i need to use another Technology for my requirement?

The Fiori App should work in an On-Premise System and in the ABAP-Cloud.

entry.title: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Parameters in Fiori Elements?
entry.content:
We are sending notification emails to users based on conditions. One of them is a date, with the value as current date.

Users get a link in the email that they can use to launch the report. Is it possible to set the values of the filters of the filter bar using URL parameters, especially if we need dynamic values?

We are using a List Report template, with SAP UI5 v1.96

entry.title: visual code studio command run failed with error : spawn einval
entry.content: Hello Community. When I run a fiori elements application in VS code I am receiving the error: visual code studio command run failed with error : spawn einval. Does anyone know how I can solve this problem? Thank you

entry.title: Fiori Application not fetching the data from back end sap system
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have created a simple fiori application, where the purpose is to display the list of materials from the sap system. I have created the odata service which has the following:

Entity set: MaterialListSet

Properties: MATNR, MTART

Everything is working well in "/n/iwfnd/gw_client" when I tested the odata service. 

But when I try to run the fiori app, it does not fetch me the data from the back end system. 
I am attaching screenshots of viewname.view.xml and the fiori app screen for reference:

Here, the material data on the sap system has property values MATNR and MTART as EXXXXX and PART. But when it fetches the data, it shows MATNR_1 and MTART_1 as property values in the fiori screen.

Please help me fix this. Thank you!

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Public2402: How to enhance "Item data" within the "repair order" app in the launchpad
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

We are working on the newest version of S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and would like to enhance the "item section" in the "display repair order" application within the launchpad (Application ID: "TBT116RPO")

The requirement is to add new custom columns within the item section, which can be manually modifiable by users and whose content should be controlled later on during the SAVE operation (when creating or updating a repair order):

 My main issue right now is adding these new columns with the custom data.

 

First, when checking the application itself, looks like this is not a fiori application build in with the UI5 framework, but rather with the "WCF" framework:

Application details in the fiori launchpad

This is confirmed with the documentation found in the fiori reference library, where this app seems not to be a fully Fiori application, but rather a "Web Client UI application"

Application details within the fiori reference library

When trying the key user extensibility, in order to find the suitable "business context" to use to create new custom fields for the new columns to add at the "repair order item" level, somehow the key user extensibility tool does not provide a "plus +" icon (which normally opens directly the "custom fields and logic" fiori application with the suitable business context). The "Adapt UI" on the "repair order" application only seems to allow to move sections up and down: 

Key user extensibility not available at the repair order app?

Thus, I am wondering whether key user extensibility works on such Web UI applications, I guess not? am I wrong?

Since the key user extensibility "did not provide me" the direct access to the "custom fields and logic" app with the suitable business context, I started digging in SAP ADT and I felt like the I_ServiceDocumentItem data definition is the one "behind" the repair orders item list (service Object type = "BUS2000116") as shown in the example below: 

I_ServiceDocumentItem is the data definition behind the "Repair order" item screen

Based on this, I used the "custom fields and logic" app to create one new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" under the business context: "Service Item" which I have enabled on the "Service transaction item I_Service DocumentItem". This lead to extending the I_ServiceDocumentItem structure with a new custom field: 

Custom field added at the repair order item level

I was hoping that this first action will allow me to "add new custom data" at item level, for a repair order, which now "only" needs to be shown in the launchpad app "display repair order".

Is this first action am taking correct to fuflill my requirement? Will I be able by following these steps to add the new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" as a new column in the item level at the "repair order" screen? Will this require from me to extend "R_ServiceDocumentItemTP" or maybe "C_InhRepairOpenRepairOrderItem" or maybe both? Or am I going into an incorrect direction?

Is my requirement "feasible" in a S/4 HANA Cloud public edition environment?

Thank you all in advance

entry.title: Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - "Jump to" - Navigation-Link
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

On the following SAP Fiori app:

Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - F0944A

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0944A')/S23OP

 

I face the following error:

The "Jump To"-Button does a infinity-loading after clicking on it. Result should just be the in-app navigation to other existing Fiori Applications that are related to this app eg. Display G/L Account Balances, etc. All error logs and console is empty:

Can someone help?

Regards,

Mann_im_Fass

entry.title: Loading Reuse S1 Component from Manage Material coverage app gives errors
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have deployed pp_mrp_reuses1(F0844) component as a custom library into abap repo. my aim is to run the extended version of app Manage Material Coverage(F0251) which should use a fragment of my custom library where i have extended my fields for the table.. To open Manage material i already have extended Monitor Material coverage app(F0247A).  all three apps are deployed onto the repository.

 
Problem i am facing is when i navigate from monitor materials to manage materials app i am getting an error from the library files of the standard reuse component pp_mrp_reuses1.
I am able to load my custom Reuse Library that i can see from sources but error comes up in the standard part of the library somehow. Random errors in S3parent of standard reuse component come-up.
I see all three extended/adapted apps running in the sources.
For navigation i am using 
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation")  
toExternal method. with my semantic object action and parameters opening my extended version of the manage materials app.
So confused as to what piece of this puzzle is a miss??

entry.title: Custom Fiori Catalogs are not available
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Custom fiori Catalogs are not available in KPI Design while creating Tile only Standard catalog available. Please help...

Thanks-

Abhishek

entry.title: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for example, when the new products are being added into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how would the customer be notified they have to add the price to the added materials and also the sales price to it?

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

entry.title: This logic is working for the gui.. how to get this field populated with app f3163 automatically ?
entry.content:
In the sapgui during BP create  the value of bu_group is copied to the field bpkind and augrp. With the fiori app F3163 we want to have the same during ‘submit’. How can that be done with a Tier3 enhancement or Tier2 wrapper? Of course, one should check if the ‘bu_group’ has been changed first (after creation it is not possible anymore to change this field/value anymore in our system).

thx in advance,

regards

entry.title: SAP Fiori Frontend 6.0 App installation and connection to SAP Business Suite
entry.content:
Hello there,

I got recently the request that my HCM team want to access their bank details via Fiori app. Since we are still on ECC and not on HANA, I chose the Fiori Front end Server solution.

I installed the Fiori server and successfully set up the connection to the HCM system ( trusted connection, SSO, distribute the permission for the users, local aliases, etc.) 

The setup is the following:

FES

Backendsystem (ABAP HCM)

Nothing special installed for the Fiori setup.

---------

Now comes the difficult part for me: I already can see the fiori app "bank details". When i click on the app, i get an error that an odata service is missing (/sap/opu/odata/sap/HCMFAB_COMMON_SRV/$metadata).

The odata service can not be found in /N/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

When I have a look in the Fiori-App-Library, I can see as requirement that I need as product Version in the backend system SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM + GBX01HR5 605 - SP 0024. ( Requirements for the Fiori Front end are met in my opinion)

Our Solman (aggregate) also suggest to install the marked green components.

My questions are now:

1. Do I need to install SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM + GBX01HR5 605 - SP 0024 on the HCM Backend server? When I do this, i wont have the necessary odata service at the FES, but i should activate this one. Does that even work?

 

2. Could it be possible to install the GBX01HR5 605 component on the FES ( I mean, then i would also need the whole EA-HR packages...)

3. The GBX01HR5 software component is part of the SAP Fiori 2.0 for SAP ERP HCM product version - did I understand that correctly?

 

Sorry for the long text.

 

Regards

Florian

entry.title: How to execute/fire onPost when user press enter on FeedInput element of SAP UI5?
entry.content:
Hi.

How to execute fire onPost when user press enter on FeedInput element of SAP UI5? I need that when the user press enter in FeedInput element in SAP fiori the system behaves as when the user click on post button.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: How to use CopyProvider on Table created by TypeScript View and show copy button?
entry.content:
How to use CopyProvider on Table created by TypeScript View and show copy button? I need to use CopyProvider on a Table element in SAP UI5/Fiori and show the copy button on that table. The table was fully created using TypeScript, so I need add the copy provider using typescript.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: We have just completed a 2023 FPS 01 upgrade - the FLP looks all messed up
entry.content:
The "save button" is missing from the settings - so no changes can be made to any of the FLP settings (for e.g., appearance)

Also the std SAP Home page menu and the business catalog listing appear to have overlapped each other - so neither option is fully accessible

entry.title: Fiori App F1564
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Dear Edrilan_Barisha,

could you please update the information on this question?

Solved: Fiori app Manage bank statements F1564 - adding at... - SAP Community

We like to use GOS with Businessobject BUS4499. TCode FEBAN provides usage of BO BUS4498 on position level, but we need a possibility of adding BO's on bank statement level...same as required in the old blogentry..

entry.title: RAP: VH filter on child lvl based on value from parent entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem.

Our requirement is to build an application where it will be possible to create a group of suppliers for some purchasing organization and then on child level add suppliers to the group.

On the photo you can see a group created for Purchorg 1000.

 

Now i want to add suppliers to the group. For the field supplier i have created a VH. I need to take the value for PurchOrg from parent entity and based on it, display the VH. But it doesn't work. There is no value in the field PurchOrg.

I tried to do that in 2 ways with additional binding. Based on key field PurchOrg and based on association field. In both cases, it doesnt work.

After creation of new entry for supplier, the value for PurchOrg is passed. I think that at the time of creation these values are not filled. 

After creation the value is passed.

Anyone have an idea how can pass the values from parent entity into vh on the child lvl(entity).

 

Thanks!
